reason: Current Trellis workflow and finish-work expectations.
Check acceptance criteria, API contract, forbidden scope, and required tests.
Check expected files, code patterns, and scope boundaries discovered before implementation.
Verify targeted frontend tests/build and no native dialog regression.
Verify frontend guards and PageResponse field normalization.
Verify paginated admin state does not become global or stale.
Verify no schema drift and correct ai_chat_sessions semantics.
Verify invalid filters and detail 404 status behavior.
Verify cross-layer API contract and Good/Base/Bad cases.
Verify no duplicate API/controller/service/UI path was added.
Check API facade params and no duplicate wrapper.
Check bounded list rendering, filter paging, detail behavior, no unrelated UI edits.
Check endpoint signature, ApiResponse<PageResponse>, and SUPER_ADMIN guard.
Check PageResponse mapping, filtering, clamps, sorting, and detail unchanged.
Check pageable query and user/role eager loading.
Check backend tests cover pagination/filter/error behavior.
